title: AI YouTube Automation: How to Start a YouTube Channel With AI
summary: A video tutorial demonstrating full AI-driven YouTube content production from research to publication in 20 minutes. The workflow covers trending research, script generation, thumbnail creation, AI avatar synthesis, video editing, and content repurposing using tools like ChatGPT, Claude, HeyGen, Descript, and others.
writeup: The tutorial walks through a full AI-driven YouTube production pipeline, from trend research to published video, compressed into a 20-minute workflow. It chains specific tools across each stage: ChatGPT and Claude for research and scripting, HeyGen for AI avatar synthesis and voice cloning, Descript for editing, plus AI image generation for thumbnails. The closing stages cover repurposing finished content into additional formats. The takeaway is a concrete, end-to-end stack showing how research, script generation, avatar video, editing, and distribution can be assembled without manual filming.
